name: Date Comparison Validation
description: Compare two date fields to ensure proper ordering (start before end)

examples.name: Contract Date Range Validation
examples.useCase: Ensure Contract End Date is after Start Date
examples.errorMessage: End Date must be on or after Start Date.

examples.name: Opportunity Close Date vs Create Date
examples.useCase: Prevent Close Date before Created Date
examples.errorMessage: Close Date cannot be before the date the Opportunity was created.

examples.name: Event Start/End Time
examples.useCase: Ensure Event ends after it starts
examples.errorMessage: End Time must be after Start Time.

testCases.name: Should fail validation (end before start)
testCases.errorMessage: End Date must be on or after Start Date.

testCases.name: Should pass validation (same date)
testCases.note: Same-day start and end is allowed

testCases.name: Should pass validation (start date null)
testCases.note: Rule only validates when both dates present

variations.name: Date Range with Minimum Duration
variations.description: Require minimum days between start and end
variations.errorMessage: Contract must be at least 30 days long.

variations.name: Date Range with Maximum Duration
variations.description: Limit maximum days between start and end
variations.errorMessage: Contract cannot exceed 365 days. Please use multi-year contract record type.

variations.name: Date Range with Today Check
variations.description: Ensure start date is not in past
variations.formula:
AND(
  NOT(ISNULL(StartDate)),
  NOT(ISNULL(EndDate)),
  OR(
    EndDate < StartDate,
    StartDate < TODAY()
  )
)
variations.errorMessage: Start Date must be today or in the future, and End Date must be after Start Date.

variations.name: DateTime Comparison
variations.errorMessage: End Time must be after Start Time.

bestPractices: Always null-check BOTH date fields before comparing
Use ISNULL() for date fields (not ISBLANK)
Decide if same-day start/end is valid (use < or <=)
Provide clear explanation of date ordering in error message
Consider if null dates should be allowed
commonPitfalls: Using ISBLANK instead of ISNULL for date fields
Not considering timezone for datetime comparisons

deploymentConsiderations.impactAnalysis: Query records with end date before start date
deploymentConsiderations.rolloutStrategy: Fix existing invalid date ranges before activation
deploymentConsiderations.dataCleanup: Export and fix records with invalid date ranges
deploymentConsiderations.edgeCases: Test with same-day start/end, null dates, leap years

monitoringMetrics: User complaints about valid dates rejected
maintenance.dependencies: Both date fields must exist and be accessible

author: Salesforce Plugin Team
